concerns.text: Dependency table references tasks T040, T042, T046, T047 which do not exist in the actual task list (T001-T020, T076-T077). This creates documentation inconsistency. Either add these tasks to the list or remove the orphaned dependency entries.

The table notes 'T042→T040 concern' and 'T077 depends on T076' but T040/T042 are not defined. The resolved concern notes reference task IDs that were removed from the plan without updating the dependency table.
